WhyItMatters: Correlates identity activity with endpoint logons, process execution, network activity, remote access, and suspicious scripting.
ReviewSteps: Identify devices where the target user logged on.
Review failed and remote interactive endpoint logons.
Check for suspicious process execution after logon.
Review outbound network activity from user devices.
Pivot to Defender XDR device timeline when suspicious evidence appears.
ExpectedResults: Rows may show endpoint logons, failed logons, remote access, process execution, network activity, or scripting on user devices.
NoResultsMeaning: No endpoint telemetry was returned or Defender for Endpoint Advanced Hunting tables are unavailable.
RecommendedActions: Validate whether endpoint activity is expected.
Review Defender for Endpoint onboarding and table availability.
Use Defender XDR device timeline for suspicious devices.
Follow approved containment workflow if malicious activity is validated.
